title: Happier Happy Ghasts
body:
A resource pack which replaces the texture of the baby happy ghast, the big happy ghast and its spawn egg with happier ones!

## With Happier Happy Ghasts
![Two big happy ghasts with a very joyful expression floating before a forest. The right one has a red harness on it, with the goggles down. Between them is an item frame with the happy ghasts spawn egg with a matching expression.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/961f82348f3b6330d24228f9794afa21581a679e.jpeg)

## Without Happier Happy Ghasts (Vanilla)
![Two big happy ghasts with a content expression floating before a forest. The right one has a red harness on it, with the goggles down. Between them is an item frame with the happy ghasts spawn egg with a matching expression.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ce519d2eb21d8646670fc059a42d7913c80fae.jpeg)
